label: Parking Demo
info: MQTT gate simulation for Smart Parking University.

name: Track gate command
Build status
Track gate status
Render dashboard
func:
function escapeHtml(value) { return String(value ?? '-') .replace(/&/g, '&') .replace(//g, '>') .replace(/\"/g, '"') .replace(/'/g, '''); } const stateMap = flow.get('gateStates') || {}; const rows = Object.values(stateMap) .sort((a, b) => String(a.gate_id).localeCompare(String(b.gate_id))) .map((gate) => ` ${escapeHtml(gate.university_id)} ${escapeHtml(gate.campus_id)} ${escapeHtml(gate.gate_id)} ${escapeHtml(gate.plate)} ${escapeHtml(gate.event_type)} ${escapeHtml(gate.access_status)} ${escapeHtml(gate.barrier)} ${escapeHtml(gate.reason)} ${escapeHtml(gate.last_event)} `) .join(''); msg.headers = { 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8' }; msg.payload = ` Smart Parking IoT Dashboard

Smart Parking University - IoT Demo

Vista simple de Node-RED para comandos MQTT y estado de barrera por universidad, campus y puerta.

${rows ? `${rows}
Universidad Campus Puerta Placa Tipo de evento Estado de acceso Estado de barrera Motivo Ultimo evento
` : '
Aun no hay eventos MQTT recibidos.
'}
Refresca automaticamente cada 3 segundos. Ruta Node-RED: /parking-dashboard
`; return msg;
